title: Shih-Feng (Fredric) Huang, MD
text:
Attending Colorectal Surgeon at Kaohsiung Veterans General Hospital. Building a unified framework that links preoperative planning, intraoperative proficiency, and postoperative outcomes in robotic colorectal surgery.
→ Coming soon: flagship white paper, June 2026.

title: Publications
text:
Full list maintained at ORCID 0000-0002-8037-4074.
(BibTeX-driven list coming soon.)

title: Research
text:
Three connected axes:

Planning — CT pelvimetry, anatomical risk stratification
Proficiency — RA-CUSUM, machine learning learning curves
Outcomes — Functional, oncologic, patient-reported

title: About
text: Shih-Feng (Fredric) Huang, MD. Attending Colorectal Surgeon. Da Vinci certified. Surgical data scientist working at the intersection of robotic surgery, Python, and deep learning.
